flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Atlantic Technical College fell 15% between 2006 and 2009 (54.0% → 45.9%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Atlantic Technical College rose 11% between 2001 and 2003 ($5.5k → $6.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Atlantic Technical College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5k → 3.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Atlantic Technical College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (62.4% → 71.6%).
